title: Christmas Wrapping Paper Set - 4 Rolls, 16m Total - 70cm x 4m Recyclable Gift Wrap - Festive Assorted Designs - Eco-Friendly Sustainable Paper (Kids)
features: Set of 4 Christmas wrapping paper rolls, 16 metres in total length
Each roll measures 4m x 70cm, plenty for gifts of all sizes
Features assorted festive patterns for a cheerful holiday look
Printed on FSC responsibly sourced paper, high quality and durable
Fully recyclable gift wrap, eco-friendly, sustainable, and guilt-free
description: Product Description Set includes 4 rolls of premium Christmas wrapping paper with a total of 16 metres, giving you an ample supply for wrapping a wide variety of holiday gifts, from small stocking fillers to large presents for family, friends, and office exchanges. Each roll measures 4m x 70cm, offering generous coverage that makes wrapping easier, smoother, and more practical, ensuring you have enough length and width to handle different gift sizes without worrying about running short. Previous page Next page Designed with assorted festive patterns that create a cheerful and magical holiday look, these rolls add charm to every gift, making your presents stand out beautifully under the tree or during festive gatherings. Printed on FSC responsibly sourced paper that is durable, recyclable and eco-friendly, giving you a sustainable wrapping option that reduces waste while still providing strong, high-quality gift wrap for the entire Christmas season. Previous page Next page 1 About This Item 2 Set of 4 3 Mixed Festive Designs 4 Fully Recyclable 5 Wrapping Paper Rolls How many rolls are included in the set? The set includes 4 rolls of wrapping paper, with a total length of 16 metres, enough for gifts of all sizes. What size is each roll? Each roll measures 4m x 70cm, providing generous coverage for small, medium, and large presents. Is the wrapping paper eco-friendly? Yes, it’s printed on FSC responsibly sourced paper and is fully recyclable, making it a sustainable choice for guilt-free festive gifting.
